Bluetooth headphones and wireless earbuds have revolutionized the way we experience audio, providing a seamless and cord-free listening experience. These compact and innovative devices leverage Bluetooth technology to connect to various audio sources, such as smartphones, tablets, and computers, eliminating the constraints of traditional wired headphones.

See all 16 recs

View List
St Maarten, another fab Caribbean Island

St. Maarten, a Caribbean gem, captivates visitors with its unique blend of Dutch and French influences, creating a vibrant and cosmopolitan atmosphere that sets it apart from other tropical destinations. This island paradise is renowned for its stunning beaches, where powdery white sands meet crystal-clear turquoise waters, offering an idyllic backdrop for relaxation and water activities. The friendly locals contribute to the warm and welcoming ambiance, providing a taste of the island's rich cultural diversity. With a diverse culinary scene that fuses European and Caribbean flavors, St. Maarten delights food enthusiasts with a tantalizing array of dishes. The lively atmosphere of Maho Beach, where planes fly low overhead, and the duty-free shopping in Philipsburg add to the island's allure. I still have so many fond memories of St Maarten, I will go back in a hartbeat

Madeline Romine

Where to Eat, Shop and Catch a Great Show in Cool Newtown and Enmore, Sydney

Come to Newtown and Enmore in the Inner West, Sydney for a great day out! It's famous for its got cool bars and live performance venues, eateries, second-hand clothing and antiques shops, and a few other cool designer shops as well! I'm lucky I'm a local and so I'll always find something fun to do around here! It's a great place to catch up with friends too!

Melissa Kerswill

14

Marlton Recreation Park

Spacious park....many youth sports leagues are based here. There are pavilions available for rent, walking and jogging trails (which are also paved for bike riding) and three modern playgrounds for the kids to play and have fun.

Di Paolo's Italian Ristorante

This little gem is in the center of Penns Grove, NJ. Family-owned restaurant with fine dining and a wonderful atmosphere. They usually have some great special going on that usually entails tons of delicious authentic Italian food, wine, desserts, etc. This is a restaurant that you must visit. People come from all over to check it out!

Cinder Bar

Nice little spot to watch the game, occasional live music and all around nice vibe. Great food, good drinks, good time.

Grey's Anatomy Scrubs Official Site | Exceptional Quality ...

Hands Down All Time Favorite Scrub set! &nbsp;Super soft and comfy. &nbsp;Extremely durable and can wash in the sanitary cycle without falling apart or fading. &nbsp;👍👍

Dansko Comfort Footwear – Dansko, LLC

Working bedside? &nbsp;Standing and walking for 12 hours+ every shift? &nbsp;I was shocked at how support and comfortable these were! &nbsp;Side Note: Do Not Recommend if you are Rapid Response for the night…. you aren't running anywhere fast in these! lol

Pink Fluffy Pen

Laugh all you want, but I kept a pen like this just to loan out! &nbsp;Guess what, every doc, lab tech, pharm, radiologist, cna returned this pen. &nbsp;Every. Time! &nbsp;Don't knock it if you pens keep getting swiped, try it! lol.

It's all about the Nurse, About the Nurse, About the Nurse!

Nurses and Healthcare Workers are an entity of their own! &nbsp;We give to a fault, poor from our own glass way too often, care for all, work until we are exhausted and then work some more… and we often have a warped sense of humor. (We just can't be that perfect!). So, what you will find, is anything and everything that is All about the Nurse!
